basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Research Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website iitgn.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in Computer Science and Engineering, or Artificial Intelligence, or allied fields
qualification.details: Research Associate-I: Ph.D. degree in Computer Science and Engineering, or Artificial Intelligence, or allied fields, with a relevant background. Candidates who have submitted a Ph.D. thesis are eligible to apply. The percentage should be at least 60% or an equivalent grade from graduation onwards. At least 55% or equivalent in class 10th and 12th is required.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate-I: Ph.D. degree in Computer Science and Engineering, or Artificial Intelligence, or allied fields, with a relevant background. Candidates who have submitted a Ph.D. thesis are eligible to apply. The percentage should be at least 60% or an equivalent grade from graduation onwards. At least 55% or equivalent in class 10th and 12th is required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Research Associate-I position at IIT Gandhinagar is 27-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate-I position as per the official notification released by IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. degree in Computer Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, or allied fields to be eligible for the Research Associate-I position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-I post is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate-I position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 75,400.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Research Associate-I recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Research Associate-I position at IIT Gandhinagar is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, or by visiting the official website of IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date is 10-07-2026, and the last date for application submission is 27-07-2026.
